name: AgentFinance v5 Complete Rebuild
objective: Complete rebuild of AgentFinance trading system with 8 operational teams, 21 specialized AI agents, 46 signal strategies across 5 market sectors using FastAPI + React/Vite + SQLite + Ollama
exit_criteria: Stage 1: Project skeleton with FastAPI + SQLite + basic React dashboard
Stage 2: Team structure implemented with 6 departments + 21 agents
Stage 2: ICT strategies core (ICT-01 to ICT-09) with v2 enhancements
Stage 3: Debate mechanism implemented (Bull/Bear/Neutral → Fund Manager)
Stage 4: Dashboard with signals view, activity feed, basic analytics
